repo.description: The official implementation of “Sophia: A Scalable Stochastic Second-order Optimizer for Language Model Pre-training”

terms.context_snippet: This is an official implementation of the **Sophia-G** optimizer in the paper [https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.14342](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.14342) and GPT-2 training scripts. The code is based on [nanoGPT](https://github.com/karpathy/nanoGPT/) and [levanter](https://github.com/s…
